tool.name: Collection self-pairs
tool.description: one {id}_{id} per element identifier (self-cross diagonal to exclude)

param.name: input
param.label: List collection
param.help: The {id}_{id} self-pairs are derived from this collection's element identifiers.

tool.help: Emits one ``{id}_{id}`` line per element identifier of the input list collection — the self-cross diagonal to remove with ``__FILTER_FROM_FILE__`` (remove_if_present). Run it on the genome collection for panel self-pairs, or on the anchor collection for anchor self-pairs.
